tags: 12孔AC陶笛C调指法,6孔AC陶笛C调指法,少儿陶笛
lyric_text:
Do是一只小母鹿，Re是金色阳光

Mi是称呼我自己，Fa是道路远又长

Sol是穿针又引线，La这音符紧跟Sol

Ti是饮料茶点，然后我们再唱

Do oh oh oh!

Do  Do Re Mi Fa Sol La ti Do Sol Dodoe a deer, a fe- male deer，ray a drop of gold- en sun



me a name I call my- self，far a long long way to run


sew  a nee- dle pull- ing thread， la a note to fol- low sew



tea  a drink with jam and bread，

That will bring us back to
